positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a mountain landscape meeting a celestial ocean. The composition is centered, featuring sharp, jagged mountain silhouettes in deep sapphire blues and teal, contrasting sharply against a swirling, bioluminescent cosmic night sky filled with geometric nebulae and aurora borealis effects. A stylized, graceful wave crest breaks in the foreground, painted with glowing gold and emerald accents, giving the illusion of liquid starlight. The style is geometric flat vector art mixed with synthwave aesthetics, utilizing strong, clean lines, high contrast, and pop art color blocking. Perfect for a t-shirt print, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blur, low quality, grainy, artifact, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, lines, messy, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs, copyright, realism, photo, bokeh
